data.title: Spot Gold Reaches New Historical Highs
data.description: According to PANews, spot gold prices have reached a new historical high, currently reported at $3,086.45. The price has increased by nearly 1% within the day.

Over 1. 6 billion tokens, valued at $1. 4 billion, will be unlocked in the next 12 months, increasing the circulating supply and diluting the value of existing tokens

data.title: 67,000 ETH on the verge of liquidation, the whale is only $35 away from the liquidation price of its ETH position
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, the giant whale with 67,000 ETH on the verge of liquidation is only $35 away from the liquidation price of its ETH position. According to previous news, on March 11, the giant whale's 67,000 ETH position was on the verge of liquidation due to the decline in ETH prices, and the position was saved from liquidation by repayment and reduction of positions. Later, the rebound of ETH temporarily freed his position from the risk of liquidation, and there was no increase in margin, reduction of positions, etc. to reduce the liquidation price. Now ETH is about to fall back, and if it falls by another $100, his position will be liquidated again.

data.title: Sonic Labs ditch algorithmic USD stablecoin for UAE dirham alternative
data.description:
Sonic Labs has canceled plans to launch a US dollar-pegged algorithmic stablecoin, opting instead to develop a United Arab Emirates dirham-denominated alternative. On March 22, Sonic Labs co-founder Andre Cronje said the company was working on a US dollar-pegged algorithmic stablecoin with an annual percentage rate (APR) of up to 23%, Cointelegraph reported. However, one week later, the firm reversed course. “We will no longer be releasing a USD based algorithmic stable coin,” Cronje said in a March 28 X post
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sonic-usd-algorithmic-stablecoin-dirham-stablecoin?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Global Liquidations Reach $125 Million in Four Hours
data.description: According to PANews, the past four hours have seen significant liquidations across the global market, totaling $125 million. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $120 million, while short positions experienced liquidations of $4.8771 million. The data highlights the volatility and rapid changes in the market dynamics.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 600 USDT with a 4.89% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 29, 2025, 11:45 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 600 USDT and is now trading at 599.919983 USDT, with a narrowed 4.89% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Best New Meme Coins on Presale as Bitcoin Nears Next Bull Run
data.description:
Bitcoin’s recent dip from an all-time high of $109K all the way to $77K rattled a lot of retail investors, who started panic selling, which further intensified $BTC’s fall. However, smart investors knew all along that corrections in an extremely bullish market (referring to Bitcoin’s November run) are healthy. In fact, they only mean one thing – new accumulation zones before the next rally begins. Several strong technical analysis signals are now pointing towards the same, i
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/best-new-meme-coins-on-presale-as-bitcoin-nears-next-bull-run/

data.title: In the past hour, the entire network has liquidated more than 80 million US dollars, mainly long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past hour, the entire network has a liquidation of 83.4061 million US dollars, of which long orders have a liquidation of 81.7889 million US dollars and short orders have a liquidation of 1.6172 million US dollars.
